items.title: Honeywell Unveils New Biocrude Technology for Sustainable Fuel
items.description: Honeywell has introduced a new Biocrude Upgrading process technology that converts agricultural and forestry byproducts into sustainable aviation fuel, marine fuel, and gasoline, offering a solution for decarbonizing heavy transport sectors.

items.title: America's industrial giants are getting a boost from the AI build-out that remains in its 'early stages'
items.description: Data center demand was a bright spot for the industrial sector's third quarter earnings as power and manufacturing demand from Big Tech have rapidly grown.
